ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team name */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_statistics" (
  "play_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play statistic */,
  "play_id" INTEGER /* ID of the play the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "yards_rushed" INTEGER /* Yards rushed on the play */,
  "yards_passed" INTEGER /* Yards passed on the play */,
  "yards_received" INTEGER /* Yards received on the play */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Tackles made on the play */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Sacks made on the play */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Interceptions made on the play */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_statistics" (
  "player_game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player game statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "yards_rushed" INTEGER /* Yards rushed by the player in the game */,
  "yards_passed" INTEGER /* Yards passed by the player in the game */,
  "yards_received" INTEGER /* Yards received by the player in the game */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Tackles made by the player in the game */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Sacks made by the player in the game */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Interceptions made by the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the official worked */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Name of the official */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the official (e.g., referee, umpire) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who was injured */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game where the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., concussion, knee sprain) */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
